sentences.arabic: قَرَأَ يَحْيَى قِصَّةَ نَبِيٍّ مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ الْكَرِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Jahja je pročitao priču o poslaniku iz Kur'ana Časnog.
sentences.translationEn: Yahya read the story of a prophet from the Noble Quran.

sentences.translation: Zadivilo ga je strpljenje poslanika i povjerenje u Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: He was impressed by the prophet's patience and trust in God.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ أَنْ يَتَعَلَّمَ مِنْ قِصَصِ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Odlučio je učiti iz priča o poslanicima.
sentences.translationEn: He decided to learn from the stories of the prophets.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ: الْقُرْآنُ يُعَلِّمُنَا كَيْفَ نَعِيشُ بِخَيْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je: Kur'an nas uči kako dobro živjeti.
sentences.translationEn: He said: The Quran teaches us how to live well.
